topics.name: Ontology Design Knowledge
topics.description: Root topic for the Ontology-Playground seed corpus: how to design entity/relationship ontologies for semantic query systems.

concepts.name: Entity Type
concepts.description: A category of business object with typed properties; the class unit of an ontology.

concepts.name: Property
concepts.description: A typed fact about an entity (string, integer, decimal, date, datetime, boolean).

concepts.name: Relationship
concepts.description: A named, directed connection between entity types; modeled with verb semantics, not foreign keys.

concepts.name: Identifier Property
concepts.description: The unique, stable, preferably business-key property that lets a system count, group, and join instances. Required on every entity type.

concepts.name: Cardinality
concepts.description: How many instances can connect on each side of a relationship (1:1, 1:N, N:1, N:M); drives correct GROUP BY and JOIN generation.

concepts.name: RDF Triple
concepts.description: Subject-predicate-object statement; the atomic unit of RDF graphs.

concepts.name: OWL Mapping
concepts.description: owl:Class = entity type, owl:DatatypeProperty = property, owl:ObjectProperty = relationship, rdfs:domain/range = ownership and type.

concepts.name: Namespace
concepts.description: URI prefixing that keeps ontology resource identifiers globally unambiguous.

concepts.name: Semantic Query
concepts.description: Natural-language question translated into a structured query by reading the ontology (the Fabric IQ premise).

concepts.name: Junction Entity
concepts.description: Resolve a many-to-many relationship into an intermediate entity that carries its own properties (Assignment, Enrollment, OrderLine).

concepts.name: Hub Entity
concepts.description: A central entity where many relationships converge, anchoring traversals (Shipment, Department, Store).

concepts.name: Classification Tree
concepts.description: Hierarchical categorisation as linked entities: industry codes (NAICS), category trees, geographic Region-Country-State chains.

concepts.name: Classifier Entity
concepts.description: Promote a classification itself to an entity so grades/ratings are queryable objects (FIBO loan and risk classifiers).

concepts.name: Shortcut Edge
concepts.description: Deliberately denormalised direct relationship that bypasses a frequent multi-hop path (Zava ofVariety).

concepts.name: Cross-Source Unification
concepts.description: Bind entities from different physical stores (Lakehouse, Eventhouse, semantic model) into one ontology so cross-system questions become single traversals.

concepts.name: Event Modeling
concepts.description: Model occurrences as entities; choose aggregate (PaymentHistory) vs atomic (Payment) grain; QC events, sensor readings as time-series entities.

concepts.name: Risk Propagation Cascade
concepts.description: DisruptionEvent to RiskAssessment to MitigationAction to BackupSupplier lifecycle; risk travels along graph edges and triggers automation.

concepts.name: Feedback Loop
concepts.description: A cycle in the graph where downstream results adjust upstream state (quality inspection tunes the production process, reviews inform products).

concepts.name: Temporal History
concepts.description: startDate/endDate pairs on association entities to keep assignment and tenure history queryable over time.

concepts.name: Standards Adaptation
concepts.description: Simplify an industry-standard ontology (FIBO) for an operational system while preserving source IRIs and attribution.

concepts.name: Regulatory Encoding
concepts.description: Encode regulation (Basel III risk weights, OCC/FDIC limits) as properties and flags so compliance questions are graph queries.

concepts.name: God Entity (anti-pattern)
concepts.description: One entity accumulating dozens of unrelated properties; split into one-concept entities and relate them.

concepts.name: Missing Identifier (anti-pattern)
concepts.description: Entity without a unique identifier property; instances cannot be counted, grouped, or joined.

concepts.name: Vague Relation Name (anti-pattern)
concepts.description: relatedTo/hasLink style names that erase semantics; use specific verbs (prescribes, enrolledIn).

concepts.name: Circular One-to-One (anti-pattern)
concepts.description: A 1:1 edge in both directions between two entities usually means they are the same entity; merge them.

concepts.name: Over-Modeling (anti-pattern)
concepts.description: Turning every internal table into an entity; model only what users will query.
